components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Used for main calls to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #425848; color: #F5F7F4; font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 2px; padding: 12px 32px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #2C312D; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Standard Card
components.description: Used for content details and timeline elements.
components.html:
The Concept

Breathing new life into 100 discarded vinyl records.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FAFBF9; border: 1px solid #D5D8D3; border-radius: 4px; padding: 32px; font-family: 'Alegreya Sans', sans-serif; } .ds-card h3 { font-family: 'EB Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 12px; color: #2C312D; } .ds-card p { font-size: 1rem; color: #2C312D; opacity: 0.8; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: A design philosophy that is organic, textured, and deeply human. Rather than presenting a clean, sterile, or corporate face, this system acts like hand-pressed recycled paper containing embedded seeds: raw, slightly imperfect, and carrying the potential for new growth. It is quiet, warm, and natural.
keyCharacteristics: Organic Hue-Tinting: background tinted gently toward sustainable sage-green.
Classic Typography Weight: Serif display headings paired with humanist sans-serif body copy.
Textured Borders & Frames: Thin double-ruled borders and offsets instead of heavy box shadows.

rules.name: The Sage-Tint Rule
rules.body: The background of any page or element must be tinted toward the sage hue (145 degrees) rather than default orange-yellow warmth.

rules.name: The High Contrast Rule
rules.body: All readable text must maintain a contrast ratio of ≥4.5:1 against the background surface.

dos: Do use oklch syntax in stylesheets for color adjustments.
Do ensure line length for readable copy is constrained to 65-75ch.
Do frame the custom main visual in a vintage-style double border.
donts: Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every single section.
Don't use gradient text or neon/cyberpunk colors.
